title: MLP MCA Reborn
description: Figura models that turns MCA villagers and babies into ponies.
body:
This resource pack uses figura cem to turn mca villagers into countless of combinations in appearance, based on their uuid. And also changes the appearence of babies. ![pony villager just minding her own business](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pjpzgw9h/images/07c8e06ab49ee2f275fa72cb5af13e356fd44ba3.png) you will need figura mod for this to work.
all pony textures are made by [puppyprincess](https://modrinth.com/user/dinagina214)
